name: Asparagus & Crunchy Orange Top
recipeInstructions:
1. Snap off the tough ends of the asparagus.
2. Remove the scales if desired.
3. Arrange the asparagus in a vegetable steamer over boiling water.
4. Cover and steam for 4 minutes until crisp tender.
5. Drain; arrange on a serving platter and keep warm.
6. Melt the margarine in a small saucepan over low heat.
7. Add the almonds and sauté until lightly toasted.
8. Stir in the marmalade; cook until heated.
9. Spoon the mixture over the asparagus.
